name_en: 【Genuine Leather】🌈 Premium Exclusive🔥 Matte Gold Wheat / Antique Gold
name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】🌈 Premium Exclusive🔥 Matte Gold Wheat / Antique Gold
▪ROSE▪️ Autumn/Winter New Arrival, Korean Celebrity Style Hobo!! The hot bag of the year is finally here from Y!! The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured without being too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives a unique vibe that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and chic 👍
Model: 713938【Genuine Leather】
Size: 23x22x8cm
